seo.title: Investors — NOBOCO
seo.description: NOBOCO is building the world's first AI-driven OS for international scale, transforming the $50B cross-border SME opportunity into a frictionless utility.

hero.title: Investing in the Future of Global Expansion
hero.description: NOBOCO is building the world's first AI-driven OS for international scale, transforming the $50B cross-border SME opportunity into a frictionless utility.

thesis.title: Capturing the $40-60M Gap
thesis.description: SMEs represent 90% of global businesses but only 20% of cross-border trade due to high friction, regulatory opacity, and fragmented execution. Bridgebase solves this by centralizing global logistics, legal, and compliance into a single AI-orchestrated stack.
thesis.point1: Standardizing fragmented regulatory data for autonomous execution.
thesis.point2: Scaling service provider access via an API-first partner network.
thesis.point3: Proprietary NOBOCO network data creates unreplicable AI training sets.

friction.title: The Friction
friction.description: Manual, opaque expansion workflows requiring 12+ vendors and expensive siloes of legal advice.

catalyst.title: The Catalyst
catalyst.description: Bridgebase OS: A 3-layer architecture that automates orchestration, standardizes execution, and verifies partners.

advantage.title: Strategic Advantage
advantage.description: A multi-dimensional revenue engine with deep defensive moats.

stack.label: PLATFORM DOMINANCE
stack.description: Owning the entire expansion lifecycle allows for recurring retainer fees and transaction-based margins from verified partner executions.

nbp.label: THE NETWORK MOAT
nbp.description: Our Network Bias Protocol ensures quality through algorithmically verified partner history, creating a fly-wheel of trusted performance.

data.label: AI PROPRIETARY SETS
data.description: Token-based access to predictive expansion modeling powered by exclusive data from over 28 active market nodes.

m1.title: 2026: Bridgebase MVP Launch
m1.description: Integration of primary partner APIs and AI core orchestration engine.

m2.title: 2027: Regional Scale-up
m2.description: Penetration of APAC/EU markets and automated compliance desk rollout.

m3.title: 2028: Institutional Dominance
